supervisor.reason: The Codex trusted-directory repair scope is complete: dormammu now adds --skip-git-repo-check only when the installed codex exec help output advertises that flag, avoids duplicating an explicit operator-provided skip flag, and focused adapter plus broader CLI/config validation passed.

bootstrap.goal: Repair Codex CLI execution so dormammu can run outside trusted directories by applying --skip-git-repo-check when supported.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the Codex trusted-directory repair slice. dormammu now adds --skip-git-repo-check for Codex only when codex exec --help advertises the flag, avoids duplicating an explicit operator-provided skip flag, passes the focused adapter/help/parser suite plus the broader CLI/config suite, and the manual codex exec reproduction confirms the trusted-directory guard is cleared when that flag is present.

items.text: Phase 1. Reproduce the Codex trusted-directory failure and confirm which codex exec flag clears the startup guard
Phase 2. Update the Codex preset path so dormammu adds --skip-git-repo-check only when the installed CLI advertises support
Phase 3. Add regression coverage for the supported-flag path and for explicit no-duplication behavior
Phase 4. Run focused validation across the agent adapter, command builder, CLI, and config surfaces

next_action: Prepare a commit for the validated Codex trusted-directory repair, or extend operator documentation around Codex compatibility flags and trusted-directory behavior.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets Codex CLI invocation compatibility when dormammu runs in non-trusted directories.
The Codex preset now adds --skip-git-repo-check only when codex exec --help advertises the flag.
Codex-specific default flags are now applied after capability inspection so dormammu can gate compatibility behavior on the installed CLI version.
Focused validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_agent_cli_adapter tests.test_command_builder tests.test_help_parser`.
Broader CLI/config validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_cli tests.test_config`.
Manual reproduction confirmed codex exec fails without --skip-git-repo-check and proceeds past the trusted-directory guard when the flag is present.
